nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for content creation
nodes.label_negative: Manual research and writing for routine tasks

nodes.label: AI as editing assistant

nodes.grounding_span: I try to keep my outreach sounding conversational

nodes.label: AI adherence to user style preferences

nodes.label: AI that handles specific customer queries responsively
nodes.label_negative: AI that ignores specific questions and gives generic responses
